title: City of Glass
logline: On Earth he never lost — a relentless self-made professional who owed everything to three things: two gifts he was born with, a flawless memory and a mind that could unravel any skill it studied, and an iron will he forged through years of thankless grind. Then he collapsed and died. He wakes in a warring world of sword-cultivators, trapped in the broken body of a nameless slave killed with a blade through the chest — no System, no cheat, only those same gifts and the will to use them. From the very bottom he rises the only way he knows: brutal training, ruthless study, and luck he learns to seize. But this world has no summit — every height he reaches reveals stronger enemies and greater allies, and the further he climbs the more the powers of the realm turn to face him. His ascension is not a destination; it is a war that never stops escalating.
